observed: StartConversion returned three segments for きょうは
the first segment key/value was きょうは/今日は

recommended_boundary.core: Mozc ConverterInterface in a long-lived private sidecar
recommended_boundary.session_owner: Hazkey ImeReducer and external Protocol v2
recommended_boundary.transport: private length-prefixed protobuf between Swift and the sidecar
recommended_boundary.rejected_boundary: Mozc SessionHandler, because it would duplicate session, composer, keymap, watchdog, and commit state

safety_profile.learning: enable_user_history_for_conversion=false and incognito_mode=true; no FinishConversion, sync, or history mutation in S0. This intentionally does not satisfy the current partial-commit learning counters.
safety_profile.secure_input: do not send reading or context to the sidecar; purge local maps and helper buffers
safety_profile.failure: on helper crash or EOF, retain the reading, report converterUnavailable, and respawn on the next request
safety_profile.stale_candidates: the existing reducer generation/revision guards reject them before a core call

learning_parity.status: intentional S0 product-contract gap; restore the existing counters or obtain an explicit product decision before default switching

protocol_v2_scenarios.evidence_level: design responsibility mapping only; none of the nine end-to-end scenarios was executed with the Mozc core
protocol_v2_scenarios.partial-commit: exactly-once reducer effect, remove prefix, then reconvert; learning is intentionally off in S0

shortest_slice: Pin the upstream source and add helper convert, convertFirstSegment, and purge operations with learning hard-off.
Add Swift transport and select it only with FCITX5_GRIMODEX_CONVERTER=mozc; retain Hazkey as the default.
Reuse the surface mapper, enforce secure no-call, and respawn after helper failure.
Run the nine visible/session semantic scenarios against a fake core with a dedicated learning-off expectation; do not count this as full product parity.
Add the generic project/personal dictionary overlay and repeat the paired process benchmark before considering a default switch.
